---
title: Toolbar
sidebar: components
appPreview:
  file: components/layout/toolbar/app-preview.py
  static: true
listing:
- id: example
  template: ../../_partials/components-detail-example.ejs
  template-params:
    dir: components/layout/toolbar/
  contents:
  - title: Preview
    file: app-detail-preview.py
    height: 400
  - title: Express
    file: app-express.py
    shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#-J4ldaEEIqAouHQCBQYCo2goYAr9qAA
  - title: Core
    file: app-core.py
    shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#code=NobwRAdghgtgpmAXAAjFADugdOgnmAGlQGMB7CAFzkqVQDMAnUmZOqASzIgGdl2Z0pBhT5cA+twBuAcwA6ERs2TcAFuwi4+AoSICCmIg2oATOAyIBXdvPkZ0Yq8gC8yKzijS4YuuwAecYwAKeWRQ13YsYigGIJCw+LcomLEVOChTBmCIeJyw2TAACTSM-II43ISIilJSABsAI2isipbwrGq6xoYxdXQLCjF6-
- id: relevant-functions
  template: ../../_partials/components-detail-relevant-functions.ejs
  contents:
  - title: ui.toolbar
    href: https://shiny.posit.co/py/api/ui.toolbar.html
    signature: ui.toolbar(*args, align="right", gap=None, width=None)
  - title: ui.toolbar_input_button
    href: https://shiny.posit.co/py/api/ui.toolbar_input_button.html
    signature: ui.toolbar_input_button(id, label, *, icon=None, show_label=MISSING,
      tooltip=MISSING, disabled=False, border=False, **kwargs)
  - title: ui.toolbar_input_select
    href: https://shiny.posit.co/py/api/ui.toolbar_input_select.html
    signature: ui.toolbar_input_select(id, label, choices, *, selected=None, icon=None,
      show_label=False, tooltip=MISSING, **kwargs)
  - title: ui.toolbar_divider
    href: https://shiny.posit.co/py/api/ui.toolbar_divider.html
    signature: ui.toolbar_divider(width=None, gap=None)
  - title: ui.toolbar_spacer
    href: https://shiny.posit.co/py/api/ui.toolbar_spacer.html
    signature: ui.toolbar_spacer()
- id: variation-with-spacer
  template: ../../_partials/components-variations.ejs
  template-params:
    dir: components/layout/toolbar/
  contents:
  - title: Toolbar with spacer
    description: Use `toolbar_spacer()` to push elements to opposite ends of the toolbar.
    apps:
    - title: Preview
      file: app-variation-with-spacer-preview.py
      height: 250
    - title: Express
      file: app-variation-with-spacer-express.py
      shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#-f4lAASfx5hApd2hw2lsOk8NcSORDHY0hUkzAUUxrM+OIgt066HhNX2rmUJOIuWQJ1UBmQjKuvG6yFImFI3DscGQ1Dc3CwG3khFQFFw6AQKDAVG0FDAAF8ALpAA
    - title: Core
      file: app-variation-with-spacer-core.py
      shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#-7fKxO9i6zV63HQB2S3gBvz+wKaPT6EAGQxGFDGEz+6WmO3ieXQRyxGXWm22WQAElsCYRAUTLhdxFJpLdQo8ngx2NIVB8wDCicg+USoAVpBAdq93oSiQ9phQVDsAIwABiVAFIpZNBRkteloqFPMNSJ5cJj2vZ0LcSt1QsoIcRksgBqo4Lw0WNeI1kKRMKRuIU4MhqJ5uFgvj82jrInRDHk8hJiAw4NRrEUGIY4OGAp95NmIKYIEk6MpkpIof1BkRSIMUURuC6-eRPogVhDuNx82ZMDZkPoLeZLOxayXkrnCKgKLh0AgUGAqG4KGAAL4AXSAA
- id: variation-input-label
  template: ../../_partials/components-variations.ejs
  template-params:
    dir: components/layout/toolbar/
  contents:
  - title: Toolbar in input label
    description: Use toolbar as the label for `input_text_area()` or `input_numeric()`
      to add formatting or action buttons directly in the input label.
    apps:
    - title: Preview
      file: app-variation-input-label-preview.py
      height: 350
    - title: Express
      file: app-variation-input-label-express.py
      shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#-8VYZDOz7Q7-I4nM4XCoAIWBoI24M2nHIcRREAkMnKYCB4RBYFSB0R4MJYPBTyGLze5g+X265D+SOmFS8UHCnARTM2kPOcQqAEkKGyOYQyVz0WjxFJpNjWeziOMiVzScT-hTbq93gs6T9GVzkNtSA5OfrjqdeRUAMJGuAm00S9GYmWG40EpVMlVc4XSCB8sAMdjSFQUO2bT0PdAnYhwFTAxx+hK4dBwZC4UgWBjIHbUERFfRYAuh6ZMdzcOIADndWQmEDJAAFbKUsEsQ8SHHRWB0uj0INIJEKKBZuMF0mLsvpBwwpnRYcCUCAtVhcSFUgBfZAAH2QguFxHni7lnBH6631oc+5pFH8NuPFXkhFQFCTCBQYBbYFXAF0gA
    - title: Core
      file: app-variation-input-label-core.py
      shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#-Bh-CBrDbdIHkUHUpb9EpQTqcGFUzmjBH3Jz9ACSFF5-IxgqFYXxePEUmkWR5fOI--mAGEALpAA
- id: variation-submit-textarea
  template: ../../_partials/components-variations.ejs
  template-params:
    dir: components/layout/toolbar/
  contents:
  - title: Toolbar in submit textarea
    description: Add a `toolbar` parameter to `input_submit_textarea()` to include
      toolbar inputs in the `textarea`'s submit area.
    apps:
    - title: Preview
      file: app-variation-submit-textarea-preview.py
      height: 400
    - title: Express
      file: app-variation-submit-textarea-express.py
      shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#code=NobwRAdghgtgpmAXAAjFADugdOgnmAGlQGMB7CAFzkqVQDMAnUmZOqASzIgGdl2Z0pBhT5cA+twBuAcwA6ERs2TcAFuwi4+AoSIZwoxCu0lx5ilqvW4scAB7o93Xv0HC+EdAFcKRPRAAmcAxEnuzy8gDu7BQqyKFYxFAM--VA4h4zg9fIgDoZUgRDooDoAGXdEOQILg--V43BFSJDYhBQABiAAOZyAG4CIgxCxWiOAOOQfjgEucS7joIRqU49xkD0EwGDGVI5O49heJuTzbW8jisAwdBqFSILbVg4wl2UpC6l4pgIFvOgOhAOTgAAcg1LVLVqy4sCMChFRHdNkFNc1tTfXKO3iV42lAoriqwbh70XGqOm+ICwGud8xruSzrPVKB-GDcqUEc9BbBc6kkmkdQAFpXhk7kYB2vaDvO5IghQABGPblHxIdkHszb-FuoRWhOhgNpDbgUAAFhu5Bg0mpZcBQV43WIABrNyz2W8CirRjtVPUhY4IAKjS7hwKmGk6V4fi9AMIwTCwSRv1KFIAqJjySP0QxjHpOA6DofN5BZyn2ZsExKBSOUzJJ-pwOo5AxFYm1xbgL47D49wniweWxJtBqLU0fjRZwM1GtwDWZkk-S6UVn5kCgAIzf6C2zNKl9ZYxYhKT8ZWFJSeWhJEkcMbtN2sIyzBspSF0wDmsN5ftoh1QN7Wwy17V039u5vYm0zdkDyhwMIVBLSy2gI6VsB00uIA
    - title: Core
      file: app-variation-submit-textarea-core.py
      shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#-B5-EZMADu3C8ADZ7pjRhRSKCeskvH5SeTkudiWtqWTxhSGGJNtt6uM4KZ6QzLmB0Ax2EIDrh0fy-s9XhCAArC0UUcWEX6S0bEEGcUpeECNcakbGNFCNAAyBruyCuEXYSyNluK1tthHtamkKjtjQAEuw3Y0AL5EtXrLk8qjWCHwaw2mASoNrTjkLwJiASGSFOiTOTNQNx2ItVVBpm0tlRyTsfKRfMY3NFlnJdkQLZzHqzUkQPm5uKNKAUE4a2Od9LSt6NXS9kzulXVweiRPJ1PSQroDB2YjjdjoRpVmfbwdQdfSCAQ4VuigDyW74mXzF+Usdhl+FQAVkKAGVqCJPsjSluc5K-DMFBNh47CFEiFTcGIgFNr+BYXNefwLGI2LlhQKh4sAhLIPiAC6f5rAhcSEbEdAOOM4wSMQRjUF4AAqDAOJYvxNPILEQC4EC2HQyh2BYBQchQRDQbMRD1GUIoQE0iC--LriYI1+jxW4IGibxdhsc6Je4OgCAoCXFdgH6OFAA
---

:::{#example}
:::

:::{#relevant-functions}
:::

## Details

A toolbar is a container for buttons, select inputs, and other UI elements in a compact form suitable for card headers, footers, and constrained spaces.

To make a toolbar:

  1. Create a toolbar with `ui.toolbar()`, typically within [`ui.card_header()`](../cards/index.qmd) or [`ui.card_footer()`](../cards/index.qmd), or within an input component as seen in the examples below.

  2. Add toolbar elements inside, such as [`ui.toolbar_input_button()`](../../inputs/toolbar-button/index.qmd) and [`ui.toolbar_input_select()`](../../inputs/toolbar-select/index.qmd). Use [`ui.toolbar_divider()`](https://shiny.posit.co/py/api/ui.toolbar_divider.html) to add visual separators and [`ui.toolbar_spacer()`](https://shiny.posit.co/py/api/ui.toolbar_spacer.html) to create flexible space that pushes subsequent elements to the opposite end.

### Toolbar alignment and width

By default, toolbars align to the right side of the container. Set `align="left"` to position the toolbar at the start of a card header or footer instead.

Set `width="100%"` on the toolbar to make it expand to fill available space. This is required for `ui.toolbar_spacer()` to push elements effectively and is automatically set when the toolbar is a direct child of a label element.

### Toolbar elements

Toolbars can contain:

- **Buttons**: Use [`ui.toolbar_input_button()`](../../inputs/toolbar-button/index.qmd) for action buttons. When an icon is provided, the label is hidden by default but available to screen readers and tooltips.
- **Selects**: Use [`ui.toolbar_input_select()`](../../inputs/toolbar-select/index.qmd) for dropdown selections. Labels are visually hidden by default but available to screen readers.
- **Dividers**: Use [`ui.toolbar_divider()`](https://shiny.posit.co/py/api/ui.toolbar_divider.html) to add visual separator lines between groups of elements.
- **Spacers**: Use [`ui.toolbar_spacer()`](https://shiny.posit.co/py/api/ui.toolbar_spacer.html) to create flexible space that pushes subsequent elements to the opposite end of the toolbar.

:::{#variation-with-spacer}
:::

### Toolbar in input components

You can use a toolbar as the label for input components like `input_text_area()` or `input_numeric()`. This allows you to add formatting or action buttons directly in the input label, creating a more integrated interface.

You can also add a `toolbar` parameter to `input_submit_textarea()` to include toolbar inputs in the textarea's submit area.

:::{#variation-input-label}
:::

:::{#variation-submit-textarea}
:::

### Accessibility

All toolbar inputs support full keyboard navigation and screen reader accessibility. Always provide meaningful labels for toolbar buttons and selects, even when using icon-only displays.

See Also: [Toolbar Button](../../inputs/toolbar-button/index.qmd) | [Toolbar Select](../../inputs/toolbar-select/index.qmd) | [Card](../cards/index.qmd)
